name: AgilePoint
description: AgilePoint — low-code application and workflow platform for enterprises. Process automation across Microsoft 365, Salesforce, and custom systems.

seo.title: AgilePoint — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: AgilePoint: AgilePoint — low-code application and workflow platform for enterprises. Process automation across Microsoft 365, Salesforce, and custom systems.

when_to_use: Low-code HR onboarding workflow with Salesforce sync
Building compliance checklists with conditional logic
Cross-system process orchestration for enterprise ops
Self-service employee request portal without custom dev

cons: UI feels dated vs modern low-code tools
review.verdict: Serious enterprise low-code for Microsoft shops that need BPMN rigor, not citizen-developer speed.
review.best_for: Large enterprises automating processes across Microsoft 365 and legacy systems
review.not_for: Startups or teams wanting modern UX and fast citizen-developer workflows

lock_in.reason: Proprietary low-code workflow engine with vendor-specific schema

developer_experience.reason: Low-code tool with APIs behind enterprise docs
